extracted_from.source: ISKM Singapore Nrsimha Caturdasi 2026 ($0.71 CPL, 222 leads) + 3 manually-authored proven WLF reference creatives
extracted_from.performance: Reference performer for the sector — patterns generalised from this dataset

headline_patterns.name: Parallel verb + emotion
examples: Prepared with care. Served with love.

headline_patterns.name: Newcomer objection question + reassurance
examples: Never been to a temple? That's exactly who this is for.
Not Hindu? You're still welcome here.

headline_patterns.name: Same X. Every Y.
examples: Every weekend. Not once a year.

headline_patterns.name: Festival → recurring program continuation
examples: Loved Nṛsiṁha Caturdaśī? It happens every weekend — quieter, smaller, just as deep.
best_for_card_type: retention bridge from festival → recurring program

examples: Sat or Sun · 5 to 7:30 PM · Free · Geylang
Free Prasadam · Sat or Sun, 7:15 PM

cta_verb_noun_pairs.context: primary RSVP — pair noun to visual subject

voice_rules.punctuation_style: declarative period at end of every short clause; no em-dashes (universal kernel rule); middle-dot · for trust-line separators only
voice_rules.language_handling_default: If client uses Sanskrit / regional language terms, transliterate only. NO devanagari script unless explicitly approved by client. Diacritics OK in headlines/copy but not on CTA pills (legibility).
voice_rules.cultural_sensitivity_rule: Avoid prescriptive religious language ('come pray', 'worship with us') for cold/LAL audiences. Lead with community / family / food / education framing — reserve overtly devotional copy for warm retarget.

event.rationale: Cold scrollers see one variant. Day/time/place/free/language MUST appear on every card or the ad fails standalone.

carousel_narrative_rule.structure: Card 1 = emotional hook (headline-dominant). Cards 2..(N-1) = unfold the promise (subject-dominant). Card N = CTA-dominant.
carousel_narrative_rule.trust_line_consistency: All cards must include the canonical event_facts trust-line. Drift = CRITICAL.
carousel_narrative_rule.cta_pill_variation_rule: Verb may stay consistent; noun MUST swap to match each card's visual subject.

competitor_voice_reference.differentiation_rule: Voice-library patterns above are deliberately the inverse: conversational, factual, warm-not-grandiose. If a generated headline could plausibly appear on a competitor's website without changes, it has failed the differentiation test.
